title: Analog Lever Tweak
description: This mod allows you to pull the Analog Lever from Create both ways while seated, making it more usable on Valkyrien Skies vehicles.
body:
This mod allows you to pull the Analog Lever from Create both ways while seated which isn't normally possible due to keybind conflict. In order to pull the lever to reduce its output signal you have to crouch which also dismounts mobs/seats.

This mod does not change the crouching mechanic, however, now you can also **use the SPRINT keybind** to achieve the same interaction with the Analog Lever.

This change is especially useful with Valkyrien Skies vehicles.
